_comment: Intake rules — defines pipeline stages, required docs, and system routing per client type

core_system.description: Business operations lane for lenders, service clients, and sales

ai_system.description: AI operations lane for Apostle Chain autonomous agents

lender.label: Lender / Investor
lender.description: Institutional lenders, family offices, private credit funds — CB Oriente portfolio
rules: NDA must be executed before any diligence materials are shared
All lender contacts are owned by Kevan — Buck is supporting only
Do not share appraisal, SHA-256, or full asset docs without signed NDA
Log every email and call in the comms system
Follow-up cadence: 7 days after outreach, 14 days after NDA, 21 days after packet
Any term sheet received must be forwarded to Kevan within 24 hours

client.label: Business / Service Client
client.description: Companies and individuals using UnyKorn platform services (FTH Pay, API, UnyKorn OS)
rules: Collect KYC/AML before any API credentials are issued
NDA required before sharing platform architecture or pricing tiers
All service agreements must be co-signed by Kevan (CEO) before execution
Buck handles discovery calls and proposal delivery
Onboarding confirmation email auto-sends on intake creation
Platform access is provisioned ONLY after signed service agreement received
Buck must update intake stage within 48 hours of each milestone

ai_agent.label: AI Agent (Apostle Chain)
ai_agent.description: AI agents being registered and funded on the Apostle Chain settlement layer (Chain 7332)
rules: Every AI agent must have a human operator on record (name + email + phone)
Operator must sign the AI Agent Service Agreement before agent is provisioned
Agent registration auto-calls Apostle Chain /v1/agents/register
Airdrop funding only after agreement is signed and recorded
Agent activity is monitored — suspicious behavior triggers suspension
AI agents operate only within declared use-case — no mission expansion without amendment
All AI agent agreements are owned by Kevan — Buck escalates any AI client to Kevan

sales.label: Sales Lead
sales.description: Inbound or outbound sales prospects for any UnyKorn product or service
rules: All leads captured within 24 hours of first contact
Discovery call scheduled within 5 business days of lead intake
Proposal sent within 3 business days of discovery call
Buck owns all sales leads — updates Kevan on deals over $10,000 MRR
Do not promise pricing or timelines without Kevan approval
Closed-won deals immediately transition to 'client' type for onboarding
Follow-up EVERY 7 days until qualified, declined, or advanced

global_rules: AI lane and core lane must stay separate in intake, contracts, and approvals
Every client/contact in the system must have: name, email, type, and assigned owner
No client receives platform access, API keys, or funds before their required docs are received
Kevan signs off on all contracts over $50,000 in value
Buck handles initial intake and discovery for client + sales types
Kevan handles all lender and AI agent relationships directly
All correspondence (email, calls) must be logged in the comms system within 24 hours
Client data is confidential — do not share with third parties without written consent
Non-negotiable: AML/KYC docs for any financial product client before onboarding
